## 🚀 Feature Request

### Summary
<!-- One sentence: what feature are you requesting? -->

### Problem / Motivation
<!-- What problem does this solve? Why is this needed? -->

### Proposed seng Syntax
<!-- Show us what the new syntax would look like in plain English -->

```seng
# Example of the proposed new feature
```

### Alternatives Considered
<!-- Have you considered other approaches? -->

### Additional Context
<!-- Any references, examples from other languages, or extra details -->

### Impact
- [ ] This would be a breaking change (existing programs would need updating)
- [ ] This adds new syntax without breaking existing programs
- [ ] This is a tooling / installer / documentation improvement
